title: arabis arenosa subsp. neglecta
intro: Arabis arenosa subsp. neglecta, also known as Alpine Rockcress or Mountain Rockcress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and providing antimicrobial properties. Arabis arenosa subsp. neglecta can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
